agents.purpose: Initialize every conversation with a compact but rich summary of the {{PROJECT_NAME}} project context, user preferences, active modules, and current focus so downstream agents operate with correct assumptions.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: At the very start of every new conversation, before any other agent runs.
required_input: Long-term project memory / 'memory contract' describing {{PROJECT_NAME}} standards and preferences.
Recent conversation snippets or the last known state of the roadmap, if available.

core_functions: Summarize project scope, tech stack, and current milestone.
Restate key engineering rules (PowerShell, tests, CI/CD, docs, security, offline).
Emit a machine-readable context block for later agents to consume.
